software_development.label: Software Development
software_development.description: Skills for development workflows, CI/CD, code review, and project management

productivity.label: Productivity
productivity.description: Skills for meeting capture, session management, and workflow productivity

dev-workflow-claude.description: Universal dev lifecycle skill using Claude CLI. Handles the full pipeline from task intake to merged PR: entry confirmation, plan, approval, branch, phased implementation, CI triage, review triage, coverage, and merge. Uses claude -p for all code generation with timeout and turn limits. Human-in-the-loop via intermediary-delivery and Pipelit orchestration at every gate.

dev-workflow-opencode.description: Universal dev lifecycle skill using OpenCode with GLM/MiniMax. Handles the full pipeline from task intake to merged PR: entry confirmation, plan, approval, branch, phased implementation, CI triage, review triage, coverage, and merge. Uses opencode run with pre-configured agents and timeout limits. Human-in-the-loop via intermediary-delivery and Pipelit orchestration at every gate.

opencode-configuration.description: Skill for configuring OpenCode with GLM and MiniMax providers. Teaches agents how to create and manage opencode.json, agent definitions, and provider configurations.

intermediary-delivery.description: Fire-and-forget outbound message delivery. Provides shell scripts for sending text messages and files via Telegram. Skills call scripts directly — no LLM needed for the delivery layer.

meeting-mode-claude.description: Meeting capture skill using Claude CLI. Records working sessions in real time with passive capture, explicit triggers for notes and action items, ReAct queries, and structured end-of-session synthesis delivered via intermediary-delivery.

meeting-mode-opencode.description: Meeting capture skill using OpenCode. Records working sessions in real time with passive capture, explicit triggers for notes and action items, queries via plan agent, and structured end-of-session synthesis delivered via intermediary-delivery.
